pkgmetadata.longdescription: poetry-version (deprecated) What to use insteadNow there is a better way to extract the version of the package.Assuming your package is named mypackagepythonimport importlib.metadata__version__ importlib.metadata.version(mypackage)This code should work as is if you are using Python 3.8.For Python 3.6 and 3.7 you need to install a backport httpspypi.orgprojectimportlib-metadata
